texto: I think about that 'empty' space a lot. That emptiness is what allows for something to actually evolve in a natural way. I've had to learn that over the years - because one of the traps of being an artist is to always want to be creating, always wanting to produce.
explicacao: Citação de Meredith Monk sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I think about that 'empty' space a lot. That emptiness is what allows for something to actually e…” articula reflexao, artist, want em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como want e think.
